Article: Sight and Sound Reviewed EoE in 2003
[]: Sight & Sound Reviewed EoE in 2003             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sun Aug 11, 2013 12:10 am ...Or at least I know that they did, because I found a record on EBSCOhost confirming that they reviewed the film in an issue of their magazine a decade ago. However EBSCOhost doesn't appear to have a copy of their review online. Anyone happen to know what they said about it? Or better yet, a copy of the review itself?
